::: {.gallery}

![](img/20230802_052036.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_061841.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_080748.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_093928.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_095723.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_101246.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_102009.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_103018.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_111449.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_111514.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_112458.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_112614.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_113056.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_113157.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_114039.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_121741.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_125906.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_132842.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_133718.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_134013.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_135358.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_142048.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_142112.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_142124.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_144507.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_150550.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_151558.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_151854.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_152121.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_152529.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_154416.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_155753.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_155757.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_155801.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_160759.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_161646.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_162500.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_170012.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_180712.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_183804.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_193629.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_194928.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_202413.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_202435.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_202812.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_203539.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_205232.webp){group="tour"}

![](img/20230802_205249.webp){group="tour"}

:::
